summary: Completed comprehensive testing of CarryOn™ signup form new fields feature: First Name, Middle Name, Last Name, Suffix dropdown, Gender dropdown, and legal disclaimer. All 12 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI tests confirmed all new fields working correctly with proper validation.
passed_tests: First Name field is required - validation works (HTML5 native validation)
Middle Name field is optional - accepts empty value
Last Name field is required - validation works (HTML5 native validation)
Suffix dropdown shows all 10 options (None, Jr., Sr., II, III, IV, V, Esq., MD, PhD)
Gender dropdown shows all 5 options (Select..., Male, Female, Other, Prefer not to say)
Legal disclaimer is visible with correct text about legal documents
POST /api/auth/register - accepts first_name, middle_name, last_name, suffix, gender fields
POST /api/auth/register - correctly handles null suffix (when 'None' selected)
POST /api/auth/register - correctly handles null gender (when 'Select...' selected)
POST /api/auth/register - validates password length (returns 400 for <6 chars)
Complete signup flow - form submission triggers OTP modal
OTP verification modal displays correctly with hint
All suffix options accepted by backend API
All gender options accepted by backend API
seed_data_creation: Multiple test users created during testing with various suffix and gender combinations
context_for_next_testing_agent: Signup form feature is complete and working. Test file /app/backend/tests/test_signup_fields.py contains comprehensive API tests for the new name fields. All dropdown options verified working. OTP verification flow confirmed working.

mocked_apis.voice_verification: Always returns success (as noted in previous iterations)

feature_verification_summary.first_name_field: PASS - Required field with HTML5 validation, data-testid='signup-firstname-input'
feature_verification_summary.last_name_field: PASS - Required field with HTML5 validation, data-testid='signup-lastname-input'
feature_verification_summary.suffix_dropdown: PASS - All 10 options present (None, Jr., Sr., II, III, IV, V, Esq., MD, PhD), data-testid='signup-suffix-select'
feature_verification_summary.gender_dropdown: PASS - All 5 options present (Select..., Male, Female, Other, Prefer not to say), data-testid='signup-gender-select'
feature_verification_summary.legal_disclaimer: PASS - Visible with correct text about legal documents
feature_verification_summary.backend_api: PASS - /api/auth/register accepts all new fields correctly
feature_verification_summary.otp_flow: PASS - OTP modal appears after successful registration
